response_data.code_logic:
# WOE for city
city = df['city']
city_transform_woe = np.nan
if (city > 0.999 and city <= 5.0): city_transform_woe = -0.2087
elif (city > 5.0 and city <= 9.0): city_transform_woe = 0.3277
elif (city > 9.0 and city <= 13.0): city_transform_woe = 0.3145
elif (city > 13.0 and city <= 15.0): city_transform_woe = 0.2700
elif (city > 15.0 and city <= 22.0): city_transform_woe = 0.3478
df['city_transform_woe'] = city_transform_woe
